response.overview: J (23), an agent who longs to return to a normal life, is assigned one final mission by his superior: to go undercover as an illicit courier. He infiltrates the network to eliminate drug dealers. At first, J enjoys the work. However, over time, he begins to carry out his duties reluctantly. He tries to leave the job, but doubt constantly lingers in his mind. The burden leaves him uncertain about what to do, and in the end, it is his own inner conflict that traps him in a dangerous cycle of life. Yet there is one last mission that truly becomes his final one, because everything changes when his identity is exposed during that operation.
response.title: Delivery
